logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script with monitoring
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "User wants me to run a specific Jira script with given filter/view IDs.",
        "The script may take 5-15 minutes to complete, so I need to monitor it.",
        "I'll start the script in background mode using code_execution_tool.",
        "Then I'll set up monitoring by checking the debug log every 30 seconds (up to 10 times).",
        "Once complete, I'll send a success notification with ticket count.",
        "If it fails, I'll send an error notification."
    ],
    "headline": "Starting Jira sync script with monitoring",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "output",
        "session": 1,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904\nexit_code=$?\nif [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then\n    echo \"Script failed with exit code: $exit_code\" >> /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log\nfi\n"
    }
}

thoughts: User wants me to run a specific Jira script with given filter/view IDs.
The script may take 5-15 minutes to complete, so I need to monitor it.
I'll start the script in background mode using code_execution_tool.
Then I'll set up monitoring by checking the debug log every 30 seconds (up to 10 times).
Once complete, I'll send a success notification with ticket count.
If it fails, I'll send an error notification.
kvps.headline: Starting Jira sync script with monitoring

tool_args.code:
python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904
exit_code=$?
if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "Script failed with exit code: $exit_code" >> /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log
fi
